{{Quote|Though I despise all in the Empire, Mox Slosin certainly comes close to being the most hated.|[[Tirranna]]|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Mox Slosin''' was a member of the [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitorius]] and one of the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] distinguished [[High Inquisitor]]s.

==Biography==
{{Quote|The scars from my encounter with High Inquisitor Slosin, both physical and psychological, still run deep.|[[Tirranna]]|<ref name="AIR" />}}
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Entuur]], he accepted his native [[Entuuran]] culture, giving a high value to pain and suffering. As a [[High Inquisitor]], Slosin was known for his sadistic nature, making his reputation rival that of even notorious High Inquisitor [[Antinnis Tremayne]]. He was famous for programming his tendencies into the [[IT-O interrogation droid/Legends|IT-O Interrogator]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]], although he personally did not use droids for interrogation.

A very effective interrogator, he however sometimes got too enthusiastic and killed the victim before extracting information. During the [[Subjugation of Fitca|subjugation]] of [[Fitca Prime]], Slosin, who was then only an [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] interrogator, killed [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Shanda Dok]] when she refused to betray the Alliance. However, as the subjugation was a success, Slosin was transferred to [[Urce]].

In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], Slosin interrogated Rebel [[Agent/Legends|agent]] [[Tirranna]], a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]]. Although Tirrana survived the interrogation, she would keep physical and psychological scars for the rest of her life, as well as an important hatred towards Slosin. Due to her first-hand experience, Tirranna was assigned to write a report on Slosin for the rest of the Rebel Alliance.

Slosin's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] was a [[Trenchant-class cruiser|''Trenchant''-class cruiser]] named the [[Ironhand (Trenchant-class)|''Ironhand'']]. Slosin was basically unsupervised as he patrolled the [[Lesser Plooriod Cluster/Legends|Lesser Plooriod Cluster]]. Contrarily to other Inquisitors, he actively sought Rebel [[operative]]s in the area, commonly traveling through the [[Burna Trade Route]] and [[Entana Run]].

In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Slosin was in his mid-50s, but he appeared to be much older due to his prematurely white and scarce [[Hair/Legends|hair]], to his long and thin beard and to his darker-than-normal wrinkled skin.

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' portrays Slosin's stats as being [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force sensitive]], while ''Star Wars Inquisitors: A History'' states he is a non-Force sensitive. While Inquisitors are typically Force sensitives, ''Star Wars Inquisitors: A History'' is a more recent source. The most likely answer is his ''Alliance Intelligence Reports'' stats, which lable his Force points as "2", which is the bare minimum stat to be considered Force sensitive. Here we can conclude he is Force sensitive, however, not to any great extent, hence the statement of not being Force sensitive.
